assumptions: initial filing is focused on structured invention framing, not final claim set
medical treatment language is excluded from filing-facing product framing
risks: prior art overlap with generic insoles
prior art overlap with generic recovery footwear
next_required_validation: Hermes review before drafting formal patent claims
invention_boundary: Pressure-informed full 3D-printed recovery footwear with controlled zone geometry, variable wall logic, and wording-safe non-medical framing.
safer_claim_scope: Focus filing scope on geometry logic, print architecture, variable structural zoning, and recovery-use embodiments; avoid treatment, diagnosis, injury-prevention, and hormone-regulation language.
